programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: Tony plans to murder his wife when he finds out that she had an affair with someone a year ago He blackmails an old college associate to execute the crime but things dont work out as planned

programme.title: Rehearsal for Murder
programme.desc: Alex Dennison Robert Preston is a playwright engaged to actress Monica Welles Lynn Redgrave But on the opening night of her new Broadway play she kills herself over some bad reviews Thoroughly distraught Alex cant believe shed commit suicide and begins to suspect she was actually murdered Under the pretext of having them read for his new play Alex invites all of the suspicious parties to an empty theater and locks them in until the truth comes out

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Notorious Nun
programme.desc: Father Thomas ONeil Timothy Bottoms is murdered and a nun Sister Margaret Michele Greene with whom he was rumoured to be having an affair is arrested as the suspect in the scandalous crime Perry Mason Raymond Burr now a judge is asked by his pal Archbishop Stefan Corro to look into it With not only Mason but his secretary Della Street Barbara Hale and his recent investigative partner Paul Drake Jr William Katt on the case Margarets name may be cleared

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 102
programme.desc: TBH 102

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S07E14
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S07E14

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Lies not been easy for actress Helen Shes getting older and her dreams of hitting the big time are disappearing When she gets a chance to take part in a beauty contest shes determined to do ANYTHING to win

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Married couple Fred and Ermas restaurant has seen better days But things change once a stranger walks in with a rather unique steak recipe

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Knight 315
programme.desc: Knight 315

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalters alert brother-in-law who enjoys tormenting prisoners

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: Mchale 404
programme.desc: Mchale 404

programme.title: Mchale 407
programme.desc: Mchale 407

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are dubious when Luke gets a part-time job as a shoe salesman but when he loses the job the rest of the McCoys unknowingly come to his aid by going to the store en masse to buy shoes

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the McCoys learn that hometown girl Glory is a Hollywood celebrity Luke fears Kate will be dissatisfied with her life when the McCoys visit her so when Glory comes to visit the McCoy men try to paint Kates life rosier than it is

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: To keep a priceless diamond out of KAOSs hands a jeweler sells it to 86 for an engagement ring for 99

programme.title: Smart 513
programme.desc: Smart 513

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget interrupts his holiday in Hawaii to stop MAD from turning it into their latest missile base by pretending that an ancient volcano is still active

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Infiltration

programme.title: The St Valentines Day Massacre
programme.desc: Follows the chronicles of gang wars held in Chicago in the early twenties between the Southside Mob and the Northside Gang Al Capone forms a team to permanently get rid of his arch rival Moran

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alpha is on the verge of being destroyed by intense shockwaves emanating from a planet they are approaching The Alphans land on the planet seemingly devoid of any human existence but being run by a group of machines The machines explain to the visitors that their human overlords are in a state of regeneration but the chief machine the Guardian sees the Alphans as a threat and it is down to two newly regenerated females known as A and B to decide their fates

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 108
programme.desc: Hercules 108

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Maiya experiences dimensional phasing Augur and Liam believe they need to bring Isabel and Maiya together to let the universe merge them Jonathan Doors announces his presidential candidacy and meets with Zoor

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens take over the members of a punk rock band and add a secret electronic signal to their music which will drive young people into a violent frenzy Meanwhile Kincaid begins a romance with his late brothers girlfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane resurrects his wife Tatania only to learn the woman hes kept frozen all these years is Kitty Lane an exotic dancer and impostor placed in Arcanes lab by General Sunderland Sunderland has been holding the real Tatania captive

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane uploads the memory of his former teacher directly into his own In an ironic twist of justice Carl Mirador was schizophrenic and is now driving Arcane insane

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E05
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E05

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Chey 508
programme.desc: Chey 508

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody is asked to join a group of traveling actors unknowingly taking part in a plot to assassinate a US general

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An old man whos feeling down because he had to sell his shop and has nothing to do sees a young man the grandson of his friend get into a fight with someone with the young man killing the other man with his gun The young man runs away leaving the gun behind The old man picks it up and when some people show up after hearing the shots they assume that the old man killed him Mike is called in and he knows the man and Mike doesnt believe he killed him but arrests him The young man was delivering something for a bookie and the one with the gun was trying to steal it He tries to explain to the bookie what happened but the bookie doesnt believe him because there is something more important than money in the box He then goes to see the old man and tells him that unless he gets the box back the bookie will do stuff to him Mike lets the old man out and follows him to find out whats going on

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The exact rendering of a map is duplicated in order to fool a female spy Its the second part of an overlay that details NATOs missile defense system

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.desc: Fish Day Pt2 The 3 Julias #juliachild Fish Day Pt5 Julia Child impersonator Array Pt1 Shrimp on Rosemary Skewers The 3 Julias #juliachild"

programme.desc: TV Shows

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jesse Arnett

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
